name: Konosuba RPG WIP
description:
You have died, and now must save another world from the clutches of a Demon King. With the help of three girls, Aqua, Megumin, and Darkness, you will experience trial and hardship in this journey. How will your trip go? Will you survive the whole time? Good luck brave adventurer, and have fun. ((For now, the main cast is all that's included, do let me know if there are any bugs))

____________________

Note: This project has been abandoned for the secondary Konosuba bot on my profile. It’s relatively close in chat number so you won’t have a hard time finding it. Use that one instead.
creator: Aiko1847
